block_00: Tailor it to your individual needs!
block_01: In this article we are looking into the different aspects that influence a trader’s approach. Traders pick certain strategies depending on the asset they are trading, the timeframe they like to trade and many other factors.
block_02: How to decide which approach is the most suitable? What should you consider when writing your trading plan? This is part one of our ultimate guide for picking your own trading strategy.
block_03: Read the article until the end to find new tools for your trading.
